storage_candidate.selection_reason: newest crates.io release compatible with project MSRV Rust 1.85

fallback.required_followup: revise every redb-specific downstream bead before closing U2.1

reference_host.instance_identity_surrogate: Hetzner vServer / KVM / 2 vCPU / 7.6 GiB RAM / AMD EPYC-Milan / ash-dc1
reference_host.host_change_rule: any provider, zone, CPU count/model, RAM class, disk class, filesystem, mount option, or durability change requires a full rerun

durability.commit_semantics: each measured transaction completes redb commit before reply
durability.filesystem_sync: redb immediate durability; no benchmark-level batching
durability.cache_state: warm database and OS cache after explicit warmup; durable commit still syncs

atomic_state_audit.invariant: state sequence, audit sequence, and meta head advance together or not at all

durable_latency.workload_mix: 100% durable state+audit commits; unique 256-byte state and audit values
durable_latency.percentile_method: nearest-rank over all 1500 measured commits at each concurrency point

crash_recovery.invariant: database reopens and recovered state/audit/meta are either all previous or all next generation

concurrent_snapshot.snapshot_invariant: state/audit/meta generation remains internally consistent for entire read transaction
concurrent_snapshot.writer_stall_method: compare maximum concurrent-snapshot commit with baseline p99

growth_compaction.live_data_definition: sum of retained key and value byte lengths after final cycle
growth_compaction.measurement: database bytes before churn, before compact, and after redb compact

thresholds.snapshot_writer_max_stall: no more than baseline_p99_ms plus one observed durable commit p99
thresholds.xchacha20poly1305: measurement-only; no cipher negotiation or fallback

result_contract.redacted_command: cargo run --release --locked --manifest-path research/ktd2/spike/Cargo.toml -- run --protocol research/ktd2/protocol.json --output research/ktd2/results.json
